entries.prompt: Create a simple class diagram with one class named Car
entries.response:
Here is a plant diagram:
```markdown
+-----------------+
| 1. Parent Class  | 2. Child Class      |
| 3. Node      | 4. Attribute      |
| 5. Value      | 6. Name      |
+-----------------+
| 1. Parent Class  | 2. Child Class       | 3. Node      |
| 4. Attribute      | 5. Value      | 6. Name      |
+-----------------+
| 2. Parent Class | 3. Attribute      | 4. Value      | 5. Name      |
+-----------------+
| 1. Parent Class | 2. Node      | 3. Attribute      | 4. Value      |
| 4. Node      | 5. Name      | 6. Node      | 7. Name      |
+-----------------+
```
